category_schema.summary: The buyer needs help choosing coffee maker for single person on the go.

decision_attributes.name: Budget
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: What's your budget for this purchase?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Exclude products above budget; prefer options toward the lower end.

decision_attributes.name: Fit for use case
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: What will you mainly use the coffee maker for, and in what setting?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Match product positioning to the user's stated use case and setting.

decision_attributes.name: Ease of use
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: How important is ease of setup and daily use to you?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Prefer highly-rated ease-of-use products for users who value simplicity.

decision_attributes.name: Reliability
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: How important is long-term reliability and warranty support?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Prioritize products with strong reliability track records.

risks: Compatibility issues that prevent the coffee maker from working in your situation
Poor build quality at budget price points that leads to early failure

category_schema.summary: Buyer needs a refrigerator that fits the kitchen space, storage needs, and feature preferences while staying within budget.

decision_attributes.name: Budget
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: What is your budget for the refrigerator?
extraction_signals: don't want to spend too much
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Products closer to or below the user's budget score better, and options above budget may be excluded.

decision_attributes.name: Refrigerator Width
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: How much width space do you have for the refrigerator?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: A product must fit the available width or it should be filtered out.

decision_attributes.name: Capacity
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: How much total refrigerator capacity do you want?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Higher usable capacity scores better when the user wants more storage, but should still fit the household and space.

decision_attributes.name: Counter Depth
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: Do you want a counter-depth refrigerator that sits more flush with cabinets?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Counter-depth models score as a match when the user wants a flush, built-in appearance.

decision_attributes.name: Ice And Water Dispenser
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: Do you want an external ice and water dispenser?
extraction_signals: don't want to open the fridge for water
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Products with the requested dispenser feature score higher; if the user does not want it, models without it score better.

decision_attributes.name: Finish Color
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: What finish or color do you want?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Products score best when their finish matches the user's stated style or color preference.

decision_attributes.name: Smart Features
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: Do you want smart features like app alerts or remote control?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Products with the desired connected features score higher, while basic models score better if the user does not want smart functions.

decision_attributes.name: Noise Level
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: Is quiet operation important for your kitchen or open floor plan?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Lower decibel ratings score better, especially for open-concept homes or noise-sensitive buyers.

decision_attributes.name: Energy Efficiency
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: How important is energy efficiency to you?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: More efficient models score better when the user wants lower operating cost or reduced energy use.

decision_attributes.name: Ice Maker Type
decision_attributes.clarifying_question: What kind of ice maker setup do you want?
decision_attributes.assessment_note: Products score best when their ice maker configuration matches the user's preference for convenience and ice output.

risks: Measure the opening carefully, including door swing, hinges, and clearance for handles.
Counter-depth models often have less usable storage than standard-depth models of the same width.
External water and ice dispensers can reduce interior space and may require plumbing.
Some finishes show fingerprints and smudges more than others.
Delivery and installation can be difficult in tight kitchens, narrow hallways, or stairs.
